footer_variants.default: You are receiving this because you signed up for Bibblio or created a story with us.
footer_variants.followup: You are receiving this because you recently explored, created, or downloaded a personalized story on Bibblio.
footer_variants.referral: You are receiving this because you created a Bibblio story and are eligible to share your referral link.
footer_variants.reply: You are receiving this because you replied to a Bibblio email or contacted us directly.

teachers.label: Classroom teacher
teachers.job_to_be_done: Support emotional development in the classroom with story-based moments that are easy to use.
teachers.pain_point: SEL matters, but generic lessons can be hard to personalize and difficult to fit into the day.
teachers.objection_to_address: Will this be practical enough for a real classroom and specific enough for my students?

creators_educators.label: Creator or educator
creators_educators.job_to_be_done: Create purposeful emotional learning stories that can help children, parents, and classrooms.
creators_educators.pain_point: They want to create meaningful children’s content but need a clear category, audience, and path to impact.
creators_educators.objection_to_address: Is there real demand for this kind of emotional learning content?

new_parents.label: New parent creator
new_parents.job_to_be_done: Get a personalized story started quickly for a child moment that feels important right now.
new_parents.pain_point: They know the situation they want help with, but do not want to start from a blank page.
new_parents.objection_to_address: Will this actually feel personal and useful for my child?

engaged_creators.label: Engaged story creator
engaged_creators.job_to_be_done: Finish the story they already started without losing momentum.
engaged_creators.pain_point: They began with good intent but got interrupted or stalled before finishing.
engaged_creators.objection_to_address: Is it worth coming back to finish this now?

repeat_story_builders.label: Repeat story builder
repeat_story_builders.job_to_be_done: Find a fresh reason to create another story for a new challenge or milestone.
repeat_story_builders.pain_point: They may think Bibblio was just a one-time novelty instead of an ongoing parenting tool.
repeat_story_builders.objection_to_address: What would I actually make next?

gift_memory_shoppers.label: Keepsake and gift shopper
gift_memory_shoppers.job_to_be_done: Create a personalized story that feels worth saving, printing, or gifting.
gift_memory_shoppers.pain_point: They want something meaningful and personal, not generic.
gift_memory_shoppers.objection_to_address: Will this feel special enough to keep or give?

referral_advocates.label: Referral advocate
referral_advocates.job_to_be_done: Share Bibblio with another parent in a way that feels natural and useful.
referral_advocates.pain_point: They need a simple reason and an easy moment to share.
referral_advocates.objection_to_address: Is this easy enough to share without overthinking it?

offers.name: Bedtime Routine Story
benefit_bullets: Turns a nightly struggle into a calmer, more familiar routine.
Gives parents a warm way to reinforce bedtime expectations without a lecture.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a story where your child becomes the calm bedtime hero who brushes teeth, puts on pajamas, and settles into sleep with confidence.

offers.name: Big Feelings Story
benefit_bullets: Helps children see tough feelings in a gentler, more manageable way.
Makes it easier to talk about emotions through a story they recognize.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a story about a child learning what to do when frustration feels huge and naming those feelings becomes part of the adventure.

offers.name: Bravery and New Experience Story
benefit_bullets: Helps children rehearse courage before a new or uncertain experience.
Turns anticipation into a familiar story with a reassuring ending.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a story about your child finding courage before a first swim lesson, haircut, doctor visit, or other unfamiliar experience.

offers.name: Friendship and Conflict Story
benefit_bullets: Makes tricky social moments easier to explore without shame or pressure.
Helps children practice empathy, repair, and confidence in friendships.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a story about a friendship wobble on the playground and how your child finds a kind, confident way through it.

offers.name: School Transition Story
benefit_bullets: Supports children through school transitions, drop-offs, and first-day nerves.
Gives parents language for reassurance that feels concrete and familiar.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a story about a child walking into school with jitters, finding a brave routine, and feeling safe enough to begin the day.

offers.name: Classroom SEL Story Pack
benefit_bullets: Gives teachers story-based prompts for bullying, anxiety, friendship, teamwork, and classroom belonging.
Turns emotional check-ins into a practical five-minute classroom routine.
offers.story_prompt_example: Create a classroom story where students recognize a friendship conflict, practice empathy, and choose one repair step together.

offers.name: Creator Emotional Learning Story
benefit_bullets: Helps creators turn real childhood struggles into useful emotional learning stories.
Connects creator purpose with themes parents and teachers already need.
offers.story_prompt_example: Publish a story around one emotional theme, such as anxiety, confidence, friendship, bullying, or school transitions.

offers.name: Personalized Keepsake Story
benefit_bullets: Turns a meaningful moment into a story worth saving, printing, or sharing.
Makes the finished book feel more like a keepsake than a temporary activity.
offers.story_prompt_example: Turn a family milestone, birthday, or hard-won breakthrough into a personalized story you will want to keep.

offers.name: Extra Credits Pack
benefit_bullets: Unlocks more personalized stories for the next challenge, routine, or memory you want to capture.
Makes Bibblio feel ready whenever another parenting moment comes up.
offers.story_prompt_example: Use extra credits to create a next story for bedtime, confidence, friendship, school transitions, or a keepsake family moment.
